strengths: Deep expertise across core technical stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, relational databases, Docker, CI/CD
15+ years of full-stack development with consistent focus on clean architecture, testing, and system design
Strong track record teaching and mentoring through workshops, talks, and open-source project governance
concerns: Seniority level significantly exceeds role scope—Staff engineer position is substantially above entry/mid-level IC expectations
PostgreSQL not explicitly mentioned in skills; has SQL/MySQL experience but not the specifically preferred database
Career pattern shows progression to senior/staff levels; applying for mid-level role creates questions about fit and retention outlook
response.justification: The candidate brings exceptional technical depth across all core requirements—TypeScript, full-stack development, relational databases, and clean architecture—with 15+ years of demonstrated expertise. However, staff-level experience far exceeds the entry/mid-level IC scope. The role targets engineers on an ascending trajectory within defined responsibilities; a Staff engineer typically requires expanded scope and leadership opportunities. This represents a fundamental seniority and career-trajectory misalignment that creates retention risk.
